proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = bundled_ideal_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](a, b)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x1(x2) } = predicate_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](a.contains, b.contains)

goal: ideal_image[R, S](f, i) = Ideal.closure[S](set_image[R, S](i.as_set, f.hom))
proof: function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T1], x1: RingHom[T1, T0]) { Ideal.closure[T0](set_image[T1, T0](x0.as_set, x1.hom)) = ideal_image[T1, T0](x1, x0) }[S, R](i, f)
function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T1], x1: RingHom[T1, T0]) { Ideal.closure[T0](set_image[T1, T0](x0.as_set, x1.hom)) = ideal_image[T1, T0](x1, x0) }[S, R](i, f)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = bundled_ideal_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](i, ideal_preimage[R, S](f, j))

goal: exists(k0: R) { i.as_set.contains(k0) and y = f.hom(k0) }

proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = set_subset_ideal[T0](x0, x1) }[S](set_image[R, S](i.as_set, f.hom), j)
let w0: S satisfy { w0 ∈ set_image[R, S](i.as_set, f.hom) and not w0 ∈ j }
function(x0: S) { not x0 ∈ set_image[R, S](i.as_set, f.hom) or x0 ∈ j }(w0)

goal: ideal_image[R, S](f, i) = Ideal.closure[S](set_image[R, S](i.as_set, f.hom))
proof: function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T1], x1: RingHom[T1, T0]) { Ideal.closure[T0](set_image[T1, T0](x0.as_set, x1.hom)) = ideal_image[T1, T0](x1, x0) }[S, R](i, f)

goal: bundled_ideal_subset[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i), j) = bundled_ideal_subset[R](i, ideal_preimage[R, S](f, j))
